data.title: Circle has minted $7.75 billion worth of USDC on Solana so far this year
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, with Circle minting another 250 million USDC on the Solana chain, Circle has minted USDC worth 7.75 billion on the Solana chain so far in 2025.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints $250 Million Worth Of USDC
data.description: According to PANews, Solid Intel has reported that the USDC Treasury has minted 250 million USDC, equivalent to approximately $250 million. This development highlights ongoing activities within the digital currency sector as USDC continues to play a significant role in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Abstract Users Advised On Security Concerns Related To Cardex
data.description: According to Odaily, Abstract contributor cygaar addressed security concerns on the X platform following attacks on some Abstract users. The issues are linked to Cardex, and users who have interacted with this application are advised to revoke related sessions. The problem is not associated with the AGW contract, and there are no vulnerabilities in the wallet functionality. The issue stems from negligence in managing session keys within the application. Users who have not interacted with Cardex can consider their funds secure. The contract has undergone multiple audits, and the session key module has been specifically reviewed. A detailed report on this matter will be released soon.

data.title: Standard Chartered Bank: More sovereign wealth funds may buy Bitcoin
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Following Abu Dhabi's recent investment in BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF, Geoffrey Kendrick, head of global digital asset research at Standard Chartered Bank, expects more sovereign wealth funds to enter the market. At the same time, he also predicted that more national pension funds and other institutional investors would buy Bitcoin, and central banks may follow suit, noting that the Czech National Bank is considering investing 5% of its 140 billion euro reserves (about 7 billion euros) in Bitcoin, and the Swiss National Bank is also in the early stages of considering Bitcoin investment. As institutional access to Bitcoin improves and volatility decreases, Kendrick expects more portfolios to "migrate from the starting point of low Bitcoin allocations to optimal levels." (The Block)

data.title: Solana Investors Show Signs Of Anxiety Amid Market Uncertainty, Says Analyst
data.description: 据Odaily报道，加密货币分析师阿里·马丁内斯（Ali Martinez）在X平台上指出，由于持续的市场不确定性，Solana（SOL）的长期投资者表现出焦虑迹象。

data.title: USDC Treasury mints 250 million USDC on Solana chain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Whale Alert monitoring, about 1 minute ago, USDC Treasury minted 250 million USDC on the Solana chain.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 660 USDT with a Narrowed 2.47% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 18, 2025, 13:47 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 660 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 660.190002 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.47% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Abstract contributors: The contract has been audited many times, and some of the attacked users are related to Cardex
Grayscale Launches New Trust Fund For Decentralized Price Data Access
data.description: According to Odaily, Grayscale has introduced a new trust fund named Grayscale PYTH Trust. This initiative aims to offer investors the opportunity to access decentralized price data through the Pyth network.

data.title: Proposed US gold reserve audit could spur blockchain adoption for sovereign reserve tracking, analysts say
data.description:
Gold prices have increased amid calls for a Fort Knox audit, sparking debates over asset oversight and the potential for blockchain tracking.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/341349/proposed-us-gold-reserve-audit-could-spur-blockchain-adoption-for-sovereign-reserve-tracking-analysts-say?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
